items.briefing:
Origin Energy has confirmed a data breach following unauthorised access to its systems, meaning customer information may have been exposed. If you're an Origin customer, be alert for phishing emails or scam calls using your personal details — criminals often exploit stolen data quickly to impersonate trusted organisations.

Separately, cybercriminals are increasingly using AI tools to carry out attacks more effectively, making threats harder to detect. A frozen food chain in Japan was also hit by ransomware this week, a reminder that no industry is immune.

**Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected email or call from Origin Energy, don't click any links — contact Origin directly using details from their official website.

featured.title: Origin Energy confirms customer data breach after unauthorised access
featured.quote: Major Australian energy provider breach exposes customer data, directly affecting millions of households.
